title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.97% today, the main contract closed at 829.5.The traders' willingness to ship is more.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is etter.PBF at Shandong port deal 866-877 yuan/mt. SSF at Shandong port deal 743 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 892-900 yuan/mt.
